summary: Frontend testing for otobrothers — route renames (/free_resources, /products), Products page (3 cards, £ pricing, button styling), Enterprise card Enquire flow, /policy page (3 PDF iframes), footer & cookie banner policy links. All 17 feature tests passed.
passed_tests: /free_resources page loads with title 'Free Resources | otobrothers AI Automation'
All 3 resource tiles present on /free_resources (ai-roi-calculator-tile, ai-assessment-tile, ai-agents-tile)
Products page shows 3 cards (product-tile-1, product-tile-2, product-tile-3)
Purchase now button styled correctly: bg-[#FF6600] text-white font-bold text-base rounded-full w-full
Enterprise card click (div onClick) navigates to / and scrolls to #contact (scrollY=2205)
/policy page has 3 sections: Privacy Policy, Terms & Conditions, Cookies Policy
/policy page has 3 PDF iframes (policy-iframe-privacy, policy-iframe-terms, policy-iframe-cookies)
Cookie consent banner 'Cookie Policy' link href=/policy, navigates to /policy
critical_code_review_comments: All implementation correct — no critical issues found
CookieConsent uses React Router Link (to='/policy') — correctly routes within SPA rather than full page redirect
Enterprise card uses div with onClick rather than anchor tag — correct per spec
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 17 specified features verified in iteration_4. Routes /free_resources and /products work. Products page: 3 cards, £249/£349, no €, orange #FF6600 Purchase now buttons, Enterprise 'Enquire now' scrolls to #contact. /policy loads with 3 sections + iframes. Footer and cookie banner policy links all route to /policy. No outstanding issues.
